title: Big Data Analytics Process Flow
description: A visual representation of the end-to-end process for analyzing big data, from raw data ingestion to actionable insights.
relationships: Data flows sequentially from Sources to Ingestion
Ingested data is stored in Storage systems
Stored data is processed and cleansed for quality
Cleansed data is analyzed using various models
Analysis results are visualized for clarity
Visualizations inform business decisions and strategy
